full_text:
Cunbahan
ARomance of the Three KingdomsEncyclopedia officer profile.
Cunbahan. Chieftain whose surrender to Jin was a major blow to Tufa Shujineng. Cunbahan was affiliated with Xianbei and the Jin Dynasty.
